events.text: Assessment complete. The T&P discharge pipe defect (missing/trapped/reduced/terminated too high) is a **fail** — high risk, non-compliant and installed-defective — since it violates IPC 504.6/504.7 and IRC P2804.6.1 requirements for a full-size, untrapped, gravity discharge terminating within 6 inches of the floor with a visible air gap.
